description: Recto and verso: Note from Netanel b. Elʿazar to Neḥemya ha-Ḥakham. The addressee had wanted to meet the sender before his departure but was unable to do so. The sender asks him to forward a letter to Yeshuʿa ha-Dayyan concerning the purchase of saffron. VMR
description_he: פתק מנתנאל בן אלעזר לנחמיה החכם. מבקש להעביר מכתב לישועה הדיין בעניין רכישת זעפרן.
